title: Micro-Max
text: Home * Engines * Micro-Max Micro-Max logo [1] Micro-Max , (μ-Max) a minimalist open source chess program in up to 2000 characters and 133 lines of portable C source-code by Harm Geert Muller . Recently Micro-Max was ported for an Atmel - ATmega88 Microcontroller [2] by Andre Adrian using WinAVR GCC , deployed for a self-made chess computer SHAH [3] and the ATM18 mini chess computer from the electronics magazine Elektor .
